---
date: "2021-05-05T00:00:00+01:00"
draft: false
menu:
  log:
    parent: Encontros
    weight: 14
title: Encontro Síncrono 4
weight: 16
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
output: 
  blogdown::html_page:
    toc: true
    css: "/assets/css/custom.css"
type: docs
---


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::include_url('https://places-research.github.io/aula04_log/', height = "400px")
```

[LINK](https://places-research.github.io/aula04_log/)
